response.justification: Strong generalist software craftsman with 13+ years of polyglot full-stack experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited depth in the core requirements: production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and cloud-based AI platforms are not demonstrated, and there is no evidence of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions or customer-facing technical discovery leadership at staff level for GenAI engagements.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production systems across web, backend, mobile, and embedded with strong TS/Node.js core
Current role at re:cinq involves MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks, directly relevant to the JD
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, open-source platforms (GISCollective), and mentoring
concerns: No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Cloud experience appears limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz; no evidence of GCP/Azure or AI-platform services like Bedrock/Vertex
Title is Senior, not Staff in AI; only ~1 year of explicit AI-adjacent work versus the 8+ years of GenAI production experience required

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic-workflow work at re:cinq
